stemHtml: The Pilot-in-Command of a commercial air transport flight has requested assistance due to a passenger experiencing symptoms of a heart attack. A doctor on board is already attending to the passenger. The flight crew suddenly hears a radio call of a small single-engined piston aircraft that is experiencing an engine failure. The radio calls with the highest priority are those of…

options.a: The small single-engined piston aircraft experiencing an engine failure.
options.b: The commercial air transport aircraft, due to the medical emergency.
options.c: All aircraft on the frequency, as they all have the same priority.
options.d: The first aircraft on the frequency.
